reasons: Minsitthar can restrict Zilong's movement skills inside King's Calling.
Zilong depends on dash engage and chase, so anti-mobility field control can stop his dive.

proof.summary: Zilong wants to dash into the backline and keep chasing, while Minsitthar can create a field that restricts movement skills and slows the commit.
worksBestWhen: Minsitthar saves King's Calling for Zilong's real dive.
The team punishes Zilong while he is trapped in the field.
failureCases: Zilong waits until King's Calling is unavailable.
Minsitthar casts too late after Zilong has already flipped the target.

reasons: Khufra can punish Zilong's direct dash engage with anti-blink control.
Khufra can stand between Zilong and the backline to make target access riskier.

proof.summary: Zilong wants to use dash engage to reach a priority target, while Khufra can punish blink movement and slow the dive.
worksBestWhen: Khufra positions near the carry Zilong wants to flip.
Khufra activates anti-dash control before Zilong reaches the backline.
failureCases: Khufra is too far from the target Zilong chooses.

reasons: Franco can stop Zilong's dive with hook or suppression.
Zilong's speed and slow immunity do not protect him from hard lock if Franco times the punish.

proof.summary: Zilong wants to run through slows and keep attacking, while Franco's suppression can lock him during the commit window.
worksBestWhen: Franco holds suppression for Zilong's real dive.
Allies are ready to burst Zilong while he is locked.
failureCases: Franco misses hook or suppresses a low-priority target.
Zilong avoids grouped fights and split-pushes elsewhere.

reasons: Belerick can punish Zilong's repeated basic attacks and direct melee commitment.
Taunt and frontline durability make it harder for Zilong to freely choose a backline target.

proof.summary: Zilong wants to dive and keep basic-attacking a priority target, while Belerick can absorb the engage and disrupt Zilong's target selection.
worksBestWhen: Belerick stays near the ally Zilong wants to dive.
Belerick has enough durability to survive the initial commit.
failureCases: Belerick cannot force Zilong to hit him.

reasons: Valir can push Zilong away before Zilong reaches the backline.
Kiting and disengage reduce Zilong's ability to convert movement speed into kills.

proof.summary: Zilong wants to chase directly into a target, while Valir can knock him back and slow his approach before the kill window starts.
worksBestWhen: Valir saves knockback for Zilong's engage.
failureCases: Zilong flanks Valir before knockback is ready.
Valir wastes disengage on another target.
